label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Headspace Health collects health-related wellness data. Offers employer and insurance-based programs with unique data sharing. Shares data with advertisers for behavioral profiling. Does not explicitly disclose health data handling standards or HIPAA compliance despite collecting health information. Does not honor standard privacy signals.
